zh.lifeSummary: Isabel FitzWilliam於大約1220年出生在英國薩默塞特維提可姆。她與Hugh Peverell在英國英格蘭戴文代文波特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1282年3月22日在英國英格蘭戴文可姆 馬丁享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Isabel FitzWilliam was born about 1220, in Withycombe, Somerset, England. She married Hugh Peverell in Devonport, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 22 March 1282, in Combe Martin, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel FitzWilliamは約1220年にイギリスソメルセトウィスイコンベで生まれた。イギリスイギリスデボンデボンプオルトでHugh Peverellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1282年3月22日にイギリスイギリスデボンコンベ マルティンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel FitzWilliam(은)는 대략 1220년 영국 서머세트 위스이코브에서 태어났다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 데폰포트에서 Hugh Peverell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1282년 3월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 코브 마틴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabel FitzWilliam родилась около 1220 г. в местности витикомб, сомирсет, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Peverell в местности девонпорт, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 марта 1282 г. в местности комб мартинь, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.
